html:
Exclusive to:

“Crafted by WX-78 imbued with a dark heart, the Exploiterators will scan their target giving WX-78 extra damage on the opponent.

WX-78 gave this drone the name of Vicky.”

-

The Exploiterator can be crafted by WX-78 with the Shadow Servitor skill and a Shadow Atrium or a Possessed Shadow Atrium implanted.

With a Shadow Atrium implanted, WX-78 can craft up to 3 Exploiterators. With a Possessed Shadow Atrium implanted, WX-78 can craft up to 4 Exploiterators. The Exploiterators with Possessed Shadow Atrium implanted have higher speed and wider range. Also their range can be slightly increased by the Signal Booster skill or by plugging in Rangebooster Circuit with the Beta Circuits Tinkering I skill.

Once crafted, the Exploiterator follows the player, even through the Sinkhole. When WX-78 attacks, the Exploiterators will fly to the target and scan it. Each increases the player's Physical Damage against that target by 6%, up to a maximum bonus of 24% with 4 Exploiterators active.

If the Shadow Atrium or Possessed Shadow Atrium is removed, all Exploiterators immediately die and drop their crafting materials on the ground.

The Catcoons will attack Exploiterators and make them disable for a few seconds.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Distinguished
Jeweled Collection
Elegant Exploiterator
It silently appraises your enemy's flaws.
Woven - Distinguished
Gothic Collection
Ominous Exploiterator
It waits, watching for weakness.

Trivia

  • The Exploiterator is added in WX-78 Skill Spotlight update.

Assets

Exploiterator

  • Idle
  • Dropped (Unused)
  • Death (Unused)
  • Death
  • Revive

Exclusive to:
Exploiterator
"Know your enemy... then destroy them!"
Crafting
×1 ×1 ( only)
Filters
(for ).
Miscellaneous
"wx78_shadowdrone_debuffer"
“It's a keen observer.”
–Wilson
“What'dya mean you can only tell WX?”
–Willow
“Aw, tell Wolfgang secret too!”
–Wolfgang
“What if the enemy is my own heart?”
–Wendy
“YES, VICKY! TELL ME THEIR SECRETS!”
–WX-78
“It studies enemies, calibrating WX's attack parameters.”
–Wickerbottom
“Creepy little fella.”
–Woodie
“The little watcher is powered by a familiar source.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a spy för the metal warriör.”
–Wigfrid
“It tells WX how to win!”
–Webber
“What do you see, mon ami?”
–Warly
“Tell robot friend how to fight friends”
–Wormwood
“I can see why WX likes you.”
–Winona
“It's got eyes on the bad guys! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“What you see?”
–Wurt
“Ooh, I think it studies the monsters!”
–Walter
“It makes fighting more efficient for WX.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kẻ khai thác có thể được chế tạo bởi WX-78 với kỹ năng Shadow Servitor và được cấy ghép Tâm nhĩ bóng tối hoặc Tâm nhĩ bóng tối sở hữu.
